steps.title: Find the quantity clue
steps.content: The phrase “over one hundred that they have spotted” shows the team found many satellites, while others found only one or two.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the clue
steps.content:
Plentiful means existing in large amounts, which matches the idea of over one hundred discoveries.
Inferior, random, and likely do not convey the sense of numerous discoveries.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
